posts.raw_content:
Hi everyone,

It's been a while since I've posted as I've been trying to ignore politics due to the health issues I'm currently having. A recap for those that don't know:

2023-dx with thyroid cancer, had thyroidectomy and radioactive iodine. Treated and done.

2025-bilateral breast cancer, stage 3 at dx. In the course of scans that followed this dx they found I also had kidney cancer. Partial nephrectomy in Sept 2025 was curative for that cancer.

Currently on endocrine therapy for treating the breast cancer. It is hard. My body aches all the time. My bones hurt. I have no energy. I'm constantly muscle fatigued. I'm struggling.

Yesterday I saw the breast surgeon and I'm scheduled for a double mastectomy in March. This is hitting me hard now. This reality is hitting me very hard. It's psychological. I'm a woman whose body makes estrogen and the estrogen is feeding the cancer that is trying to kill me so I have to cut off the breasts that are a part of being a woman. 

I don't know how to deal with these emotions. I need prayers for strength, please. I'm not in a good place mentally right now. I'm trying to be positive but there is nothing positive about what is happening right now. Nothing.

I know this is a place for politics and this post is not a political post, however, I've been here since r/T_D. You are my people and right now I'm asking my people to please pray for my mental and physical health as I navigate these next few months. 

Many thanks and much love to all that read this and take the time to pray for me today. 

~ChickNorris who is not feeling very Chuck Norris-ish right now. 

Edit: I have found a positive. I no longer have leg hair so I don't have to shave this summer.
posts.author: ChickNorris
posts.title: A prayer request: upcoming surgery for breast cancer
posts.content:
Hi everyone,

It's been a while since I've posted as I've been trying to ignore politics due to the health issues I'm currently having. A recap for those that don't know:

2023-dx with thyroid cancer, had thyroidectomy and radioactive iodine. Treated and done.

2025-bilateral breast cancer, stage 3 at dx. In the course of scans that followed this dx they found I also had kidney cancer. Partial nephrectomy in Sept 2025 was curative for that cancer.

Currently on endocrine therapy for treating the breast cancer. It is hard. My body aches all the time. My bones hurt. I have no energy. I'm constantly muscle fatigued. I'm struggling.

Yesterday I saw the breast surgeon and I'm scheduled for a double mastectomy in March. This is hitting me hard now. This reality is hitting me very hard. It's psychological. I'm a woman whose body makes estrogen and the estrogen is feeding the cancer that is trying to kill me so I have to cut off the breasts that are a part of being a woman.

I don't know how to deal with these emotions. I need prayers for strength, please. I'm not in a good place mentally right now. I'm trying to be positive but there is nothing positive about what is happening right now. Nothing.

I know this is a place for politics and this post is not a political post, however, I've been here since r/T_D. You are my people and right now I'm asking my people to please pray for my mental and physical health as I navigate these next few months.

Many thanks and much love to all that read this and take the time to pray for me today.

~ChickNorris who is not feeling very Chuck Norris-ish right now.

Edit: I have found a positive. I no longer have leg hair so I don't have to shave this summer.
